{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043506FAE8973B6CAF0E37525F"}"},"total":263},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7395169739420009278","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，有种看着巨物被钓不起来的，自豪感，仿佛我就是那个钓场老板，手握万千珍惜鱼种，巨物"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721825459,"group_id":"7375487014407244824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个在番茄小说猥琐发育的新人😏","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Sm4ZGuJ9zFre3oP0x3iu0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/996698f8db364d3cb976536458b2f7e9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708678&x-signature=ODDpnckOVC64cdA9q74LDYlYegM%3D","user_id":"281086403557879","user_name":"今晚要加餐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"281086403557879","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1711499500,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375487014407244824","book_info":{"abstract":"身为一个钓鱼佬，钓到大鱼最好的炫耀不是挂着鱼在车尾，围着小区转上几十圈。
而是开个钓场，将自己钓到的所有大鱼全部放入其中。
一次意外让陆航来到了另一个和蓝星相似的世界。
这里的面积更大，水域更大，物种更丰富。
又获得了钓场系统的他，决定开一个属于自己的钓场。
什么钓场鱼少不够钓？
没事老板亲自出去钓。
一百斤的鲫鱼
五百斤的青鱼
一千斤的鲤鱼
一万斤的草鱼
十万斤的罗非
......
从水里的到地上的，从海里的到天上的，钓场缺什么，陆航钓什么。
什么远古鱼种，上古鱼种，神话鱼种，只要是鱼就归我钓鱼佬管。
若干年后，一回头，陆航发现自己的鱼展场，已经成了所有钓鱼佬趋之若鹜的圣地。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fa4dff42f64e4aecfc7ea038f2bfae3c","author":"空梦烟","author_id":"","book_id":"7375487014407244824","book_name":"开钓场的我举办了全球钓鱼大赛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#5870c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3502人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7375487060301333016","read_count":"3502","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1354274"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"628","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,钓鱼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5e68b9e3be1033437e040612755ef874~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309306&x-signature=c7rsLPaMr0wCcQLqoHtnJ8dg9JI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3241014116234259","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043506FAE8973B6CAF0E37525F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11405,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15146,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9327},"user_action":{"author":0
